calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Vacated

Hearing On Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW R. BANNER & ATTY. JESSICA L. CAMPBELL OF SCOTT COLE & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (510) 891-9800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. NICOLE M. ELEMEN OF JACKSON & LEWIS LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 689-0404 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT VERENGO, INC. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER REVIEWING THE PAPERS WHICH APPEARS TO BE IN ORDER WITH NOTICE PROPERLY GIVEN. THE COURT ALSO FINDS THE ATTY'S FEE, COST OF THE SETTLEMENT AND VALUATION OF THE SETTLEMENT TO BE REASONABLE. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: Hearing On Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement IS GRANTED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/ehg

Ntc Of Mtn In Support Of Mtn For Order Granting Final Approval To Class Action Settlement;, Awarding Attorneys' Fees And Costs To Class Counsel, Awarding Service Payment To Representative Plaintiff And Awarding Reimbursement Of Claims Administration Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF COLIN DOUGHERTY, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF Ntc Of Mtn In Support Of Mtn For Order Granting Final Approval To Class Action Settlement;, Awarding Attorneys' Fees And Costs To Class Counsel, Awarding Service Payment To Representative Plaintiff And Awarding Reimbursement Of Claims Administration Fees And Costs is a duplicate entry.

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For An Order 1) Granting Prelinminary Approval Of The Class Action
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew R. Bainer, Esq. of Scott Cole & Associates, Tel. 510.891.9800, for plaintiff and moving party;
Mindy S. Novick, Esq. of Jackson Lewis LLP, Tel. 213.689.0404 ext.8105, for defendant, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, and to the satisfaction of the Court, PLAINTIFF COLIN DOUGHERTY, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S Motion For An Order Granting Preliminary Approval Of The Class Action is granted. A Final Approval Hearing is set for November 25, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Order signed in open court. (See signed order for details of the Court's ruling.) In addition, the Court ordered that The Declaration of Jessica L. Campbel in support of this motion, lodged conditionally under seal, shall be placed in the public file since defendant did not file a motion to seal said document. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For An Order 1) Granting Prelinminary Approval Of The Class Action
Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Continued To Sep-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF COLIN DOUGHERTY, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For An Order 1) Granting Preliminary Approval Of The Class Action is continued to September 17, 2013, on the Court's motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For An Order 1) Granting Prelinminary Approval Of The Class Action
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew R. Bainer, Esq. of Scott Cole & Associates, Tel. 213.689.0404, for plaintiff and moving party;
Mindy S. Novick, Esq. of Jackson Lewis LLP, Tel. 213.689.0404 for defendant by telephone.

RULING: The matter was discussed. PLAINTIFF COLIN DOUGHERTY, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S Motion For An Order Granting Preliminary Approval Of The Class Action is continued to September 11, 2013 at 9:30 am for further hearing. Parties to file their supplemental briefs no later than September 4. The Court granted Defendant leave to file its Motion To Seal on shortened time. The Motion To Seal which shall be filed no later than September 4, 2013 is to be heard on September 11, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302; no opposition shall be filed. (Parties must deliver courtesy copies of their papers to Department 302 on the same day the documents are filed.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
